name: JVM and .NET

tasks.title: Author Java prompt
tasks.body: Write internal/project/templates/prompts/classes/coding/java.md (40-80 lines). REPLACES coding/default.md for Java-classified tasks. Cover: idiomatic Java style (records for value types, sealed interfaces, Optional for nullable returns, streams API), build/test tooling (Maven mvn/Gradle gradle, javac, spotless/google-java-format, SpotBugs/ErrorProne), testing conventions (JUnit 5, AssertJ, Mockito for external boundaries only), and common pitfalls (checked vs unchecked exceptions, mutable collections returned from APIs, equals/hashCode contract, resource leaks without try-with-resources). Use 'prefer X' phrasing. ZERO wolfcastle content.

tasks.title: Author Kotlin prompt
tasks.body: Write internal/project/templates/prompts/classes/coding/kotlin.md (40-80 lines). REPLACES coding/default.md for Kotlin-classified tasks. Cover: idiomatic Kotlin style (data classes, sealed classes/interfaces, extension functions, null safety with ?. and ?:, scope functions let/apply/run/also), build/test tooling (Gradle with Kotlin DSL, kotlinc, ktlint/detekt), testing conventions (JUnit 5 or kotest, MockK for external boundaries), and common pitfalls (platform types from Java interop, coroutine cancellation and structured concurrency, lateinit misuse, overusing scope functions). Use 'prefer X' phrasing. ZERO wolfcastle content.

tasks.title: Author Scala prompt
tasks.body: Write internal/project/templates/prompts/classes/coding/scala.md (40-80 lines). REPLACES coding/default.md for Scala-classified tasks. Cover: idiomatic Scala style (case classes, pattern matching, immutable collections by default, for-comprehensions, type classes), build/test tooling (sbt, scala-cli, scalafmt, scalafix, Wartremover), testing conventions (ScalaTest, MUnit, or specs2, property-based testing with ScalaCheck), and common pitfalls (implicit resolution complexity, variance annotations, blocking in Future context, overusing inheritance over composition). Use 'prefer X' phrasing. ZERO wolfcastle content.

tasks.title: Author C# prompt
tasks.body: Write internal/project/templates/prompts/classes/coding/csharp.md (40-80 lines). REPLACES coding/default.md for C#-classified tasks. Cover: idiomatic C# style (nullable reference types enabled, records for immutable data, pattern matching, async/await with ConfigureAwait, LINQ), build/test tooling (dotnet build/test/format, NuGet, dotnet-format or CSharpier, Roslyn analyzers), testing conventions (xUnit or NUnit, FluentAssertions, NSubstitute/Moq for external boundaries), and common pitfalls (async void except event handlers, IDisposable leaks, deadlocks from .Result/.Wait(), mutable struct gotchas). Use 'prefer X' phrasing. ZERO wolfcastle content.

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in JVM and .NET is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Verify java.md, kotlin.md, scala.md, and csharp.md each reference their specific build tools (Maven/Gradle/sbt/dotnet) and do not duplicate generic advice already in universal.md
